creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
Recently, as drm-510-kmod set 'IGNORE_FreeBSD_15= not supported anymore', I was upgraded to drm-515-kmod but this cannot control screen brightness.
I can control brightness if I force reinstalled drm-510-kmod-5.10.163_8.pkg(drm-510-kmod-5.10.163_8~7d31bf8eed.pkg).
My machine is sony vaio vjpf11c12n.

% uname -v
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #27 main-n267686-c8bf9f09ee3d-dirty: Mon Jan 22 18:51:07 JST 2024     ishizuka@okra.ish.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/SG_UDF2
